pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh confirms the PROJECT_DIR is created and populated at this path.
Code analysis of verifier.py confirms the check `passed = score >= 70` is used for validation.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a purely synthetic Python project created by the environment. The target project directory is confirmed to be /home/ga/PycharmProjects/chem_mass. To pass the evaluation, an agent must score at least 70 points out of 100 based on the testing suite in the verification script.
